---
title: Offset-Diagonal Computing for Large-scale, Compact, Efficient, and Sparsity-enabled Optical Processors
author:
- Arjun Iyer
- Abhishek Tyagi
- Liam Young
- Yuhao Zhu
- William H Renninger
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- mlsys
url_source: https://opg.optica.org/abstract.cfm?uri=CLEO_FS-2025-JSS129_2
journ: CLEO
year: 2025
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 97
---
